sqlCommands.descr: Update TransX set Contract = 'SYB' + SUBSTRING(CAST(UWYr as varchar(4)),3,2) + '095630A' where Co = '3030' and Contract = 'BULK E21' and KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select KeyID, Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,substring(Txt,1,7) as GL,-Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) from TransX where KeyID like '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = 'H'
select top 1 * from FAGLFLEXT
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1, Assgnmt = (cast(Assgnmt as varchar) + ' ' + cast(GL as varchar)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex6) (select KeyID, Co, GL, PC, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, 'pass1' as Flex6  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID,PC,PCdesc,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,GL,FSitem) (Select '[batchID]',CostElement,Name,AllocationFunctionName,AllocationSource,AllocationFunctionHierarchy,AllocationSourceHierarchy from CostElements)
update TransX set GL = '''' + GL from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end), Flex1 = '', Txt = 'LS Inv Exp Reclass' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%97'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, Flex1, PC,Hierarchy, Flex2,Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex5) (select KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, Flex1, PC,Hierarchy, Flex2,Flex3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, 'pass2' as Flex5  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, Flex1, PC,Hierarchy, Flex2,Flex3)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Division, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Division where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Region, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Region where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Location, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Location where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Zone, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Zone where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'GLgrp'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0

update TransX set FSitem = OS_GL, FSitemDesc = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t left join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru where KeyID like '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID like '[batchID]%' and Amt1 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2850500' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2850996' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2850996' as Txt,PC,'991' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2850996' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2585000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2599996' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2599996' as Txt,PC,'991' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2599996' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','1935000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'1935996' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 1935996' as Txt,PC,'991' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '1935996' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2850500' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2850998' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2850998' as Txt,PC,'990' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2850998' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2585000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2599998' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2599998' as Txt,PC,'990' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2599998' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','1935000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'1935998' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 1935998' as Txt,PC,'990' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '1935998' group by Co, PC )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Assgnmt as GL,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like 'Balancing %')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like (cast(GL as varchar) + ' - Translation Using %')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like (cast(GL as varchar) + ' - Valuation on %')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (substring(Txt,8,21) = ' - Translation Using ' or substring(Txt,8,16) = ' - Valuation on ')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Assgnmt,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,GL,Amt1,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co,Assgnmt,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,GL,Amt1,Txt,PC,TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1,CC,Contract) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, GL, Amt1,CC,Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

update gfsdb[version].CorpAcct_Apps.dbo.IR17_Trigger set Flag = 'Y', insdt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP  where Pipelinename = 'P_PL_IFRS_SAP_AzureSQL_Pull' and GroupID = (select Field1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'Trigger' and '[BudAct]' like Descr)
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
update TransX set KeyID = KeyID + '-data3', Assgnmt = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'LS Inv Exp'
update TransX set Contract = '', Flex1 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1,CC,Contract,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1,(case when co = '2300' then '5HII000004' else '5USI000000' end) as CC,Contract,'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set Assgnmt = '' where keyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = ''
update TransX set GL = '6915000', Assgnmt = 'Fairfax stk grants' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6114001'
update TransX set Assgnmt = 'IF only' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6115007'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, CC, Contract, Assgnmt, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, CC, 'LS Inv Exp' as Contract, Assgnmt, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, CC, Contract, Assgnmt)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass2'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger <> 'IF'
